remarks: Welcome to 44 Toms Road, a rare opportunity to own a home that seamlessly blends generous living space, exceptional versatility, and an unbeatable Stamford location. Offering 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms & 1 half bath, and a thoughtfully designed floor plan, this home is built for both comfortable everyday living and effortless entertaining. Bright, inviting living spaces flow seamlessly into a spacious kitchen, creating a warm and functional layout ideal for gathering with family and friends. The desirable first-floor primary bedroom adds both convenience and flexibility. Beyond the main living areas, the property offers an abundance of finished space that can easily adapt to your lifestyle-ideal for home offices, recreation, fitness, hobbies, or other flexible uses. Buyers are encouraged to conduct their own diligence regarding the legal status and permitted uses of all finished spaces. Ideally located directly across from Dolan Middle School, and just minutes from downtown Stamford, Metro-North, shopping, dining, parks, and major commuter routes, this home offers the perfect balance of space, convenience, and opportunity.  Property is being sold in its current "as-is" condition. Buyers are encouraged to conduct all inspections and diligence they deem necessary prior to closing.
